response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance of '夢幻' by Takane Lui and Nene Momosuzu. 2. Identified the composers as MY FIRST STORY / CHIMERAZ via on-screen text. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for '夢幻' by MY FIRST STORY. 4. Broken the video into segments: the solo start, the duet, and the post-song talk. 5. Formatted the lyrics for each segment. 6. Constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video capturing a live vocal performance of the song 'Mugen' by Takane Lui and Nene Momosuzu, followed by a short celebratory talk segment.

scenes.description: Takane Lui performs the first part of the song. No second performer is present initially.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
永遠の意味
知らぬ君に
答えを示す時だ
夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ
言い訳に聞こえた理由は
儚い未来手繰った弱さ
それを強さとはき違えている
憎い
憎い
醜い
醜い
月を隠すほどの
黒く
黒く
淀む
心
君さえ居なければ
ゆらいでる
ゆらいでいる
花のように
意思をつなぐ
奪っていく
奪っていく
嵐のように
心を裂く
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The meaning of eternity,
To you who does not know,
It is time to show the answer.
To the end of the spiral that continues into the dream,
The reason that sounded like an excuse,
Was the weakness of dragging out a fleeting future,
I am mistaking that for strength.
I hate it,
I hate it,
Ugly,
Ugly,
To the extent of hiding the moon,
Black,
Black,
Stagnating,
Heart,
If only you didn't exist,
It's swaying,
It's swaying,
Like a flower,
Connecting wills,
It's taking away,
It's taking away,
Like a storm,
It tears the heart.

scenes.description: Nene Momosuzu joins Takane Lui on stage. They continue performing 'Mugen' as a duet. Text 'Music: MY FIRST STORY / CHIMERAZ' appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Continuation of the song lyrics...) The meaning of eternity, 
To you who does not know, 
It is time to show the answer. 
At the end of the spiral that continues into the dream, 
Who is waiting? 
I drank the fate I was born with, 
I remembered the names of the numbers I carried. 
To the extent of festering, 
Emotions that burn the heart. 
I hate it, 
I hate it, 
Ugly, 
Ugly, 
To the extent of dividing the world, 
Anger, 
Anger, 
Burning, 
Heart, 
If only you didn't exist, 
It's swaying, 
It's swaying, 
Like a flower, 
Connecting wills, 
It's taking away, 
It's taking away, 
Like a storm, 
It tears the heart. 
The meaning of eternity, 
To you who does not know, 
It is time to show the answer. 
At the end of the spiral that continues into the dream, 
Listening to the wailing of demons, it's the end. 
It is the end with all things dwelling in this body. 
Weak people who entrusted the dream to others, 
The radiance of life is through many years. 
In the setting sun illuminated by the twinkling of prayers, 
Dwelling a thousand nights, 
Imposing the solution, 
Withering away, 
Withering away, 
Tearing flowers in the dream night, 
Connecting, 
Connecting, 
Sowing seeds in the storm.

scenes.description: The performers engage in a conversational talk segment after their performance. No music plays.
